title: The Perfect Version of Minecraft
body:
The Perfect Version of Minecraft is a modpack that improves the vanilla experience. Heavily inspired in LemonskyRian's video.

This is a simple modpack that improves the vanilla game. It features simple world gen mods, as Terralith, YUNG's structures mods and Towns and Towers for the Overworld. For the other dimensions in Minecraft, I selected BetterNether and BetherEnd. 

Besides that, the modpack has simple tweaks mods that help with mundane tasks in Minecraft and improvements for preview existing gameplay mechanics and features, such as Easy Anvils, Easy Shulker Boxes, Better than mending and Farmer's Delight. 

Other mods that help create a more atmospheric gameplay are also present. This modpack is as simple as it presents itself.
